mapper.sql: id, user_id, income, expend, tday, yuebefore, yuealter, type, orderid, rechargeid, model, comment, yuedirection, description, dongjieafter, dongjiebefore, dongjiedirection, majororganid, organid
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from tb_users_account_change
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into tb_users_account_change (id, user_id, income, expend, tday, yuebefore, yuealter, type, orderid, rechargeid, model, comment, yuedirection, description, dongjieafter, dongjiebefore, dongjiedirection, majororganid, organid) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{income,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{expend,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{tday,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{yuebefore,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{yuealter,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{orderid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rechargeid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{model,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{comment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{yuedirection,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dongjieafter,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{dongjiebefore,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{dongjiedirection,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{majororganid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{organid,jdbcType=BIGINT})

mapper.update:
update tb_users_account_change
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
user_id = #{record.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
income = #{record.income,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
expend = #{record.expend,jdbcType=DECIMAL},

dongjiedirection = #{record.dongjiedirection,jdbcType=INTEGER},
majororganid = #{record.majororganid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
organid = #{record.organid,jdbcType=BIGINT},

update tb_users_account_change set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, user_id = #{record.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, income = #{record.income,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, expend = #{record.expend,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, tday = #{record.tday,jdbcType=BIGINT}, yuebefore = #{record.yuebefore,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, yuealter = #{record.yuealter,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, type = #{record.type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, orderid = #{record.orderid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rechargeid = #{record.rechargeid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, model = #{record.model,jdbcType=INTEGER}, comment = #{record.comment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, yuedirection = #{record.yuedirection,jdbcType=INTEGER}, description = #{record.description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dongjieafter = #{record.dongjieafter,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, dongjiebefore = #{record.dongjiebefore,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, dongjiedirection = #{record.dongjiedirection,jdbcType=INTEGER}, majororganid = #{record.majororganid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, organid = #{record.organid,jdbcType=BIGINT}

user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
income = #{income,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
expend = #{expend,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
tday = #{tday,jdbcType=BIGINT},
yuebefore = #{yuebefore,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
yuealter = #{yuealter,jdbcType=DECIMAL},

orderid = #{orderid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

dongjiedirection = #{dongjiedirection,jdbcType=INTEGER},
majororganid = #{majororganid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
organid = #{organid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
